notes: Environment degradation: WebFetch returned HTTP 403 for essentially every external domain tried this run (vendor blogs, HN, X, YouTube RSS feeds, simonwillison.net, softwaredoug.com, mistral.ai, venturebeat.com) — far more than the 'most direct fetches 403' baseline noted in prior run_logs; discovery relied entirely on WebSearch synthesis, which twice produced date/attribution errors that were caught only by cross-checking with a second independent query (Mistral Vibe's real date was May 28 not Jul 14; 'AI Explained episode 214' belongs to a different podcast). Recommend treating single-source WebSearch date/attribution claims as unverified until corroborated. Expert section fell short of min_expert_total=5 (3 articles, 0 videos) despite extensive expansion — RSS discovery for video experts was fully blocked and WebSearch could not reliably confirm upload dates for any configured video channel this run.
